function.name: get_position
function.description: Fetch the user's current Aave v3 position on Base. Returns health factor, LTV, collateral/debt totals, per-position breakdown, wallet token balances, and live borrow/supply APYs. Always call this first before suggesting or executing any trade.

function.name: chat
function.description: Handle a natural-language leverage intent: 'open a 3x BTC long using 0.001 cbBTC', 'close my ETH position', 'show my health factor'. Returns a human-readable reply plus ordered transaction_steps to sign. Best for interactive sessions.

message.description: User's natural language instruction (e.g. 'open a 3x ETH long with 0.01 ETH')

history.description: Optional prior conversation turns [{role, content}] for multi-turn context

function.name: prepare_open
function.description: Build transaction steps to open a leveraged long position on Aave v3. Returns ordered steps to sign: token approvals + flash-loan open. Use this for programmatic bots; use chat() for interactive sessions.

leverage.description: Target leverage multiplier (e.g. 3.0 = 3x). Max depends on asset LTV: WETH ~4.5x, cbBTC ~3.3x, wstETH ~4.3x.

amount.description: Seed amount in asset units (e.g. 0.001 for 0.001 cbBTC). Omit to use full wallet balance.

supply_asset.description: Asset to supply as collateral: WETH, cbBTC, or wstETH. Default: WETH.

borrow_asset.description: Asset to borrow: USDC (for longs) or WETH/cbBTC (for shorts). Default: USDC.

function.name: prepare_close
function.description: Build transaction steps to fully close an existing leveraged position. Repays all debt via flash loan and withdraws collateral in one atomic transaction.

function.name: prepare_reduce
function.description: Build transaction steps to reduce leverage on an open position without fully closing it. Partially repays debt to reach the target leverage.

supply_asset.description: Collateral asset symbol: WETH, cbBTC, or wstETH

borrow_asset.description: Debt asset symbol: USDC, WETH, or cbBTC

target_leverage.description: Target leverage after reduction (e.g. 2.0). Must be lower than current leverage.

swap_fee.description: Uniswap v3 pool fee tier in bps: 100, 500 (default), or 3000

function.name: prepare_increase
function.description: Build transaction steps to increase leverage on an open position without closing it. Borrows more and supplies more collateral to reach the target leverage.

supply_asset.description: Collateral asset symbol: WETH, cbBTC, or wstETH

borrow_asset.description: Debt asset symbol: USDC, WETH, or cbBTC

target_leverage.description: Target leverage after increase (e.g. 4.0). Must be higher than current leverage and below asset max.

swap_fee.description: Uniswap v3 pool fee tier in bps: 100, 500 (default), or 3000

function.name: swap
function.description: Swap tokens via Uniswap v3 on Base mainnet. Returns a transaction step to sign.

token_in.description: Input token symbol or address: ETH, WETH, USDC, cbBTC, wstETH

token_out.description: Output token symbol or address: ETH, WETH, USDC, cbBTC, wstETH

amount_in.description: Amount to swap in human units (e.g. '0.002' for 0.002 ETH)

function.name: analyze_performance
function.description: Analyze the strategy's historical performance from trades.jsonl. Returns win rate overall and by signal type, total/avg/best/worst P&L, filter hit rates, avg hold time, max drawdown, open position snapshot, and actionable improvement hints. Call this before proposing any config changes.

function.name: backtest
function.description: Replay the recorded price history with alternative parameters and return simulated P&L. Use compare_to_baseline=true to get a side-by-side delta between current and proposed settings. Always run this before calling update_config to verify a proposed change would actually improve performance.

base_position_pct.description: Fraction of collateral to use as seed (0.01–0.50)

max_borrow_apr.description: Borrow APR filter threshold % to test

btc_dominance_rise_threshold.description: BTC dominance change filter threshold % to test

seed_usd.description: Fixed seed per trade for comparison (default 1000)

compare_to_baseline.description: If true, also run with current defaults and return a delta

function.name: update_config
function.description: Propose and apply config parameter changes after validating them against hard bounds. Only allowed in paper_trading mode. Always call backtest first to verify the change improves performance.

reason.description: Why this change is proposed — logged for audit trail
